proposed_relations.description: 72% of transit commuters on Hylan Blvd corridor have trips longer than 60 minutes

evidence_refs.source_quote: 72% of transit commuters have a trip longer than 60 minutes

rationale: Metric describes commute time percentage for transit commuters in the Hylan Blvd corridor; scope explicitly names the corridor.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 72% of transit commuters have a trip longer than 60 minutes

quarantine.note: Cited block p004_c0006 does not state the connection between the 72% metric and Hylan Boulevard corridor. The quote '72% of transit commuters have a trip longer than 60 minutes' does not name Hylan Blvd or any corridor. It sits under the heading 'Long Transit Commute Times' (not explicitly Hylan-specific) and within a block where only the second bullet ('20% of people in the Hylan Blvd corridor...') names the corridor. The first bullet's scope is unstated in the evidence; co-occurrence in a block does not constitute a stated relation.

proposed_relations.description: 15,000 trips/day on 8 express bus routes serving the Hylan Blvd corridor

rationale: Metric describes daily ridership on express bus routes that serve the Hylan Blvd corridor; part of the corridor baseline conditions.

quarantine.note: Cited block p004_c0006 does not state the connection between the 15,000 express bus trips metric and Hylan Boulevard corridor. The quote '15,000 trips/day on 8 express bus routes' does not name Hylan Blvd or any corridor. The block provides no evidence that these 8 express bus routes serve the Hylan Blvd corridor specifically.

proposed_relations.description: 16,000 trips/day on S78 and S79 local buses on Hylan Blvd

evidence_refs.source_quote: 16,000 trips/day on S78 and S79 local buses

proposed_relations.description: 16,000 trips/day on S78 (combined with S79) local buses

evidence_refs.source_quote: 16,000 trips/day on S78 and S79 local buses

proposed_relations.description: 16,000 trips/day on S79 (combined with S78) local buses

evidence_refs.source_quote: 16,000 trips/day on S78 and S79 local buses

rationale: Metric names S78 and S79 local buses explicitly; links to both the Hylan corridor and the two specific bus routes.

evidence_refs.source_quote: 16,000 trips/day on S78 and S79 local buses

quarantine.note: The decision proposes three relations but only two are supported. The relations to route_s78-hylan-2010 and route_s79-hylan-2010 are valid (the quote '16,000 trips/day on S78 and S79 local buses' explicitly names both routes). However, the relation to corridor_hylan-boulevard-brt is unsupported: the cited block does not mention Hylan Blvd corridor. The quote alone does not state that these routes operate on Hylan Blvd — that connection exists in the route records, not in this evidence block.

proposed_relations.description: Congested intersections on Hylan Blvd cause travel time delays

evidence_refs.source_quote: Congested intersections cause travel time delays

rationale: Claim identifies a corridor issue on Hylan Blvd; description explicitly references the corridor.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Congested intersections cause travel time delays

quarantine.note: Cited block p004_c0004 does not state the connection between 'Congested intersections cause travel time delays' and Hylan Boulevard corridor. Although the block sits under the heading 'Traffic Congestion on Hylan Blvd' and the block's first bullet names Hylan Blvd, this specific bullet contains no reference to Hylan Blvd or 'the corridor'. Unlike d001 where 'the corridor' provides a linguistic anchor back to Hylan Blvd, this bullet is a bare general statement with no textual link.

proposed_relations.description: Congestion on Hylan Blvd reduces reliability of bus services

rationale: Claim identifies a corridor issue; description references congestion on Hylan Blvd specifically.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Congestion causes delays and reduces reliability of local and express bus services

quarantine.note: Cited block p004_c0006 does not state the connection between 'Congestion causes delays and reduces reliability of local and express bus services' and Hylan Boulevard corridor. The quote contains no mention of Hylan Blvd, the corridor, or any geographic scope. The heading 'Long Transit Commute Times' does not explicitly name Hylan, and co-occurrence in the same block as Hylan-specific bullets is not a stated relation.
